summary: Iteration 32b — RETEST of Task 6 (Super Admin punch data hidden) after main-agent fix to (tabs)/_layout.tsx. ALL scenarios PASS. Super_admin no longer red-screens: renders home cleanly, tab-punch=0, hero-shift=0, bento-present-today=1 (aggregate KPI kept as designed). Direct navigation to /(tabs)/attendance and /history correctly redirects super_admin back to home (URL becomes http://localhost:3000/ which is the tabs index root — spec permitted 'or /'). Employee regression: tab-punch=1 (finger-print CTA visible), hero-shift=1, /history renders the calendar. No RN LogBox 'Cannot use `href` and `tabBarButton` together' error surfaced anywhere. Real super_admin doc (sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com) untouched — pin_hash / pin_must_change / pin_fail_count verified intact post-cleanup.
action_items: None — Task 6 is now fully passing. Main agent may mark Task 6 (Super Admin punch data hidden) as verified/working in test_result.md.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix in (tabs)/_layout.tsx lines 50-73 is clean: super_admin path uses only `href: null` (Expo Router idiomatic way to remove a tab from routing); non-super_admin path passes only the custom `tabBarButton`. `href: undefined` is not passed explicitly for the non-super_admin case — but since only one of the two props is populated per role, Expo Router's guard is satisfied. Verified live on mobile viewport 390x844 in web preview.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 scenarios pass: super_admin home, super_admin redirects x2, employee regression)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral seed via /app/backend/tests/seed_iter32b_ui.py: 1 company (cmp_0c25a3e1f4, code UBE8FF), 1 employee (user_0da1a4d1e3aa via employee-signup + approved via pymongo), 1 throwaway super_admin (usr_00a2c0d720, mongo-inserted, pin_must_change=false so tabs layout mounts). All ephemeral rows deleted at teardown: 1 company + 2 users + 2 sessions removed. Real super_admin (sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com) NOT touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task 6 fully verified. Super_admin bottom-nav & personal-punch hiding works end-to-end (no red screen, correct testID counts, /attendance and /history redirect to tabs root). Employee flow unchanged. If future work touches (tabs)/_layout.tsx or the attendance/history component-level Redirects, re-run seed_iter32b_ui.py + the mobile-390x844 playwright to confirm both roles.
rca_of_issue: Fix confirmed: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx now branches the `attendance` Tabs.Screen so exactly ONE of `href` / `tabBarButton` is populated per role. Super_admin gets `href: null` (removes from routing), non-super_admin gets the custom `tabBarButton` Pressable (finger-print CTA). Expo Router's runtime assertion 'Cannot use `href` and `tabBarButton` together' no longer triggers. Component-level `<Redirect href='/(tabs)'/>` in (tabs)/attendance.tsx:248 and history.tsx:239 still executes as a defence-in-depth guard — verified super_admin visiting /(tabs)/attendance or /history lands on the tabs root URL (http://localhost:3000/) with the home dashboard rendered.
